de.uka.ilkd.key.parser

Class KeYSemanticException

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Throwable
      • java.lang.Exception
        • org.antlr.runtime.RecognitionException
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.KeYSemanticException
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    HasLocation, java.io.Serializable
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    NotDeclException

    public class KeYSemanticException
extends org.antlr.runtime.RecognitionException
implements HasLocation
    See Also:

      Returns a clean error message (no line number/column information)

      • getLocation

        @Nullable
public Location getLocation()
                               throws java.net.MalformedURLException
        Description copied from interface: HasLocation
        This method can be used to obtain the Location (1-based line and column!) of the exception.
        Specified by:
        getLocation in interface HasLocation
        Returns:
        the location of the exception
        Throws:
        java.net.MalformedURLException - if the URL for the location can not be created
